title: Save User Preset with Validation
description: FileSystem.browse and Engine.saveUserPreset used to implement a save-as dialog for user presets. Validates the chosen path is within the UserPresets folder and inside a subfolder before saving.

title: Component Lookup Map from getAllComponents
description: Content.getAllComponents with an empty prefix builds a dictionary keyed by component ID for O(1) lookups. Useful alternative to individual Content.getComponent calls when many components need referencing.

title: Batch Component Callback with getAllComponents
description: Synth.getAllEffects and Content.getAllComponents with a shared prefix to batch-wire knobs to SimpleGain effects. Compact alternative to index-based loops using prefix matching.

title: Disable Shift-Click Knob Text Input
description: Component modifiers API used to disable text input and double-click reset on knobs. createModifiers and setModifiers with the disabled flag prevent shift-click editing and default-value reset.

title: Flipped FFT Spectrum Display
description: Custom FFT visualization using Graphics.flip to mirror the spectrum path vertically with gradient fills and layered rendering. Uses beginLayer/endLayer for composited drawing of mirrored FFT paths.

title: DllTimer and DllAsyncUpdater for Third-Party Nodes
description: hise::DllTimer and hise::DllAsyncUpdater as replacements for juce::Timer and juce::AsyncUpdater in third-party C++ nodes. Required because DLL processes cannot use JUCE timers directly.

title: Broadcaster Mouse Event Listener
description: Engine.createBroadcaster with attachToComponentMouseEvents to track mouse drag on a FloatingTile. Converts vertical drag distance to a normalized 0-1 range using Math.range.

title: Copy MIDI File to AppData
description: File.copy used to duplicate a MIDI file into the AppData folder. Extracts the filename from the source File object and constructs a destination path via FileSystem.getFolder and getChildFile.

title: Auto-Load All Fonts from Folder
description: FileSystem.findFiles scans the Fonts folder for TTF/OTF files and loads each via Engine.loadFontAs. Strips the '-Regular' suffix from font names for cleaner references while preserving style suffixes like Bold and Italic.

title: Offline FFT Spectrum Generation and Display
description: Engine.createFFT with setEnableSpectrum2D to generate and render a 2D spectrum from a synthesized buffer. Configures FFT parameters (size, oversampling, gamma, colour scheme) and paints the result with drawFFTSpectrum on a Panel.

title: Browse and Load Audio File as Buffer
description: FileSystem.browse with loadAsAudioFile to let the user pick an audio file from Desktop and load it into an array of buffers. Button callback triggers the file dialog with a completion handler.

title: Array-Indexed Knob Step Values
description: Lookup array maps discrete knob positions to arbitrary step values. The knob value serves as an array index, enabling non-linear value mappings like musical intervals or power-of-two steps.

title: Mouse Drag Detection Panel Overlay
description: setMouseCallback on a detection panel tracks drag state to show/hide a blocking overlay. Compares mouse coordinates against panel bounds and previous position to distinguish dragging from hovering.

title: Macro Knob Controlling Multiple Parameters
description: Normalised-to-range helper maps a single macro knob to multiple parameters with different ranges. Uses setValue/changed pattern to programmatically update knob values from a control callback.

title: Read and Write JSON File
description: FileSystem.getFolder with getChildFile, writeObject, and loadAsObject for persistent JSON storage. Includes save and load utility functions with file-existence validation before reading.

title: CSS Rotate Keyboard Floating Tile
description: setInlineStyleSheet with CSS transform rotate(90deg) applied to a keyboard FloatingTile via setLocalLookAndFeel. Demonstrates CSS transforms on HISE floating tile components.

title: PNG Linear Slider LAF
description: LAF.loadImage and registerFunction drawLinearSlider for a custom image-based vertical slider. Calculates thumb position from valueNormalized and draws background and cap images at computed offsets.

title: Dynamic Slider Creation Loop
description: Content.addKnob in a loop to dynamically create multiple sliders with indexed names. Returns an array of component references and extracts IDs via the Array.map function.

title: CSS Preset Browser Hover Styling
description: setInlineStyleSheet using HTML table row selectors (tr, tr:hover) to style preset browser list items. Applies background colour changes on hover via CSS pseudo-classes on a FloatingTile.

title: Preset Change Callback Label Update
description: UserPresetHandler.setPostCallback updates a label with Engine.getCurrentUserPresetName after each preset load. Simple pattern for displaying the active user preset name in a custom UI element.

title: CSS-Styled Label with Selection
description: setInlineStyleSheet for a Label component with CSS selectors for default, input, and ::selection states. Configures letter-spacing, padding, caret colour, text shadow, and selection highlight via inline CSS.

title: Configurable Grid Overlay Panel
description: Panel setPaintRoutine draws a configurable grid with adjustable line count, thickness, and colours. Useful as a layout helper during UI development for aligning components to a visual grid.

title: Find Child Components by Parent
description: Content.getAllComponents with parentComponent property check to find all children of a specific panel. Iterates all components and filters by their parentComponent property string.

title: Level-Driven Image Alpha with Timer
description: Engine.createTimerObject polling Synth.getEffect getCurrentLevel to drive image opacity. Converts gain factor to decibels with Engine.getDecibelsForGainFactor and maps the value to setAlpha for visual feedback.

title: Sampler Timestretch Configuration
description: Synth.getSampler with getTimestretchOptions and setTimestretchOptions to modify timestretch behaviour. Fetches the current options object, modifies SkipLatency, and applies the updated settings back to the sampler.

title: Hybrid Script and CSS ComboBox Styling
description: registerFunction drawComboBox for the main combobox appearance combined with setInlineStyleSheet for popup menu CSS. Demonstrates how script LAF and CSS coexist with CSS taking precedence for popup menus.

title: Path Rotation by Angle
description: Content.createPath with manual rotation transform using Math.cos and Math.sin. Rotates an array of [x,y] points around the area centre by a given angle and builds a closed path from the result.

title: CSS Cursor Styling for Components
description: setInlineStyleSheet with CSS cursor property to set pointer cursor on buttons and text cursor on labels. Applies different cursor types per component type via CSS selectors and setLocalLookAndFeel.

title: Audio File Content Callback
description: Synth.getAudioSampleProcessor with getAudioFile and setContentCallback to respond when an AudioLoopPlayer's audio file content changes. Useful for triggering analysis or UI updates after file loading.

title: Label Key Press Callback Setup
description: setConsumedKeyPresses with 'all' and setKeyPressCallback on a Label to capture and log keyboard events. Starting point for implementing custom keyboard shortcuts on input components.

title: Key Press Callback with Focus Detection
description: setConsumedKeyPresses with a specific keyCode object to capture only the Escape key. setKeyPressCallback distinguishes focus changes from key presses via isFocusChange for targeted keyboard handling.

title: Sampler Selection Filter by Properties
description: Synth.getSampler createSelectionWithFilter using Sampler.Root, Sampler.HiVel, and Sampler.RRGroup to query sample properties. Enables runtime access to sample metadata like SampleEnd for specific samples matching filter criteria.

title: Monophonic Note Handling with Artificial Events
description: Message.ignoreEvent with Synth.playNote and noteOffByEventId for monophonic voice management. Checks isArtificialEventActive before killing previous notes and applies noteOffDelayedByEventId for timed release.

title: Bitcrusher Staircase Visualization
description: Panel setPaintRoutine drawing a dynamic staircase pattern driven by a knob value. StepsKnob controls both the visual step count and Bitcrusher.BitDepth attribute, with repaintImmediately in the control callback for real-time feedback.

title: LayoutBuilder Dynamic UI Factory
description: Recursive stack-based component builder that processes a JSON tree of component definitions. Uses Content.addKnob/addButton/addPanel etc. to create components dynamically and applies all properties from the JSON, enabling portable UI layouts between projects.

title: TransportHandler Beat Callback
description: TransportHandler onBeat callback using isNewBar flag to trigger different notes on bar boundaries. Synth.addNoteOn with noteOffDelayedByEventId creates timed note events synchronized to the host transport.

title: Arpeggiator SliderPack Direct Access
description: Synth.getSliderPackProcessor with getSliderPack and ScriptSliderPack.referToData to bind UI slider packs directly to Arpeggiator data. Enables direct manipulation of arpeggiator velocity, length, and semitone packs.

title: Broadcaster Global Fallback Pattern
description: isDefined check on a global namespace broadcaster with fallback to Engine.createBroadcaster for modular code. Allows namespaces to share a broadcaster if it exists globally or create a local one for standalone use.

title: JWT License Activation with Server API
description: Server.setBaseURL and Server.callWithPOST for a complete JWT authentication and license activation workflow. Chains token retrieval, validation via Server.setHttpHeader with Bearer token, and WooCommerce license activation through sequential POST requests.

title: Hardcode Development Audio Setup
description: Settings.getAvailableDeviceNames, setAudioDevice, setBufferSize, and toggleMidiInput inside an Engine.isHISE guard to auto-configure audio and MIDI devices during development. Prevents repeated manual setup after crashes or hardware changes.

title: Broadcaster Module Parameter Watcher
description: Engine.createBroadcaster with attachToModuleParameter to listen for changes to an Audio Loop Player's RootNote parameter. addListener callback receives the new value whenever the module attribute changes.

title: Toggle Knob Mode via Button
description: setMode on a knob to switch between TempoSync and Frequency modes from a button callback. Demonstrates runtime mode switching using the ternary operator with setControlCallback.

title: Keyboard LAF Black and White Notes
description: registerFunction drawBlackNote and drawWhiteNote to customise a keyboard FloatingTile's appearance. Sets per-note fill colours and adjusts area dimensions for custom keyboard rendering via setLocalLookAndFeel.

title: Error Handler for Missing Samples
description: Engine.createErrorHandler with setErrorCallback to detect missing samples at runtime. Checks state code 9 to trigger a custom overlay, with getNumActiveErrors and getCurrentErrorLevel for detailed error reporting.

title: Browse and Set Sample Folder
description: FileSystem.browseForDirectory with Settings.setSampleFolder and Engine.reloadAllSamples to let users relocate missing samples at runtime. Includes an init-guard pattern to prevent the callback from firing on component initialization.

title: Custom Table Path LAF
description: registerFunction drawTablePath with path string parsing to customize the table curve rendering. Manipulates the SVG path string via split/join and fromString to modify the default table path shape before drawing.

title: Custom MIDI Event Data Storage
description: Global 2D array indexed by Message.getEventId modulo slot count to attach custom data to MIDI events. Provides setCustomValue and getCustomValue accessors that survive across MIDI processor boundaries using a shared global namespace.

title: Modal Text Input with Custom Properties
description: Content.showModalTextInput with a properties object to configure font, position, colours, and initial text for a popup text field. Callback receives ok/cancel state and the entered text for validation.

title: Shift-Click Text Input for Knobs
description: Engine.createBroadcaster with attachToComponentMouseEvents to show Content.showModalTextInput on shift-click for multiple knobs. Calculates popup position from getGlobalPositionX/Y and formats the initial value using Engine.doubleToString with step-size precision.

title: Save Expansion User Preset with Path Validation
description: FileSystem.browse with Expansions.getCurrentUserPresetsFolder to save user presets within the correct expansion hierarchy. Validates the chosen path is nested at least three directories deep using getParentDirectory chain before calling Engine.saveUserPreset.

title: Get Expansion Names List
description: Engine.createExpansionHandler with getExpansionList and getProperties to extract expansion names into an array. Iterates installed expansions and collects their Name property for UI display or logic.

title: MIDI Player Sync to Master Clock
description: Synth.getMidiPlayer with setUseTimestampInTicks and setSyncToMasterClock to configure multiple MIDI players for synchronized tick-based playback. Iterates an array of player references to apply shared timing settings.

title: Animated Disclosure Triangle Panel
description: Panel with setPaintRoutine using Graphics.rotate for an animated triangle, setMouseCallback for toggle, and setTimerCallback for smooth 90-degree rotation animation. Uses panel data object for state and angle tracking with timer-driven repaint.

title: Broadcaster Listener with Component Binding
description: Engine.createBroadcaster with addListener binding 'this' to a UI component for state-driven updates. The listener callback uses the component passed as first argument to addListener, enabling direct property changes via this.set.

title: Serialize Component Values with SliderPack Support
description: Content.getAllComponents with type check for ScriptSliderPack to correctly serialize multi-value components. Uses getNumSliders and getSliderValueAt to capture individual slider values as arrays alongside standard component values.

title: Filter Effects Array by ID Pattern
description: Synth.getAllEffects with indexOf check to remove effects whose IDs contain an underscore. Demonstrates runtime effect list filtering by naming convention for selective processing.

title: Decimal to Hex String Converter
description: Bitwise right-shift and AND operations to convert a decimal ARGB colour value to a hex string. Useful for colour manipulation and debugging when working with HISE's integer-based colour representation.

title: Remove All Child Panels
description: getChildPanelList and removeFromParent to clean up dynamically created child panels. Call during onInit to prevent stale child panels from accumulating across script recompiles.

title: Custom Array Sort Function
description: Engine.sortWithFunction with a comparator callback for numeric array sorting. The comparator returns -1 for less-than and boolean coercion for greater-than, following the standard comparison function pattern.

title: Animated Circle Radar with Blur Effects
description: Panel setPaintRoutine using beginLayer, gaussianBlur, addNoise, and applyMask for a sci-fi radar effect. Draws concentric ellipses scaled by panel value, applies post-processing blur and noise, then masks to a circular path.

title: Colour Saturation Gradient Paint Routine
description: Bitwise colour manipulation in a ColourOps namespace to multiply saturation of an ARGB integer. Combined with a gradient fill loop in setPaintRoutine to create a horizontal desaturation fade effect.

title: Sequential Server File Download
description: Server.downloadFile with recursive downloadCallback to chain sequential downloads. Each completed download triggers the next via startNextDownload, avoiding concurrent download limits by processing the image list one at a time.

title: Deep Nested User Preset Save
description: FileSystem.getFile with getChildFile using a deeply nested path string to save user presets in custom subfolder hierarchies. Engine.saveUserPreset accepts a File object for arbitrary preset storage locations.

title: Browse and Load or Save User Preset
description: FileSystem.browse with Engine.loadUserPreset and Engine.saveUserPreset for a minimal custom preset browser. Uses a boolean flag to switch between load (false) and save (true) browse modes with .preset file filtering.

title: Save MIDI Player to File
description: FileSystem.browse with MIDIPlayer.saveAsMidiFile to export MIDI data to a user-chosen .mid file. Combines file dialog with the MIDI player's save method for user-initiated MIDI export.

title: A/B Preset Comparison Toggle
description: Button callback swaps between two stored states (A and B) of all UI components. Captures current values before restoring the alternate set, with changed() calls to propagate updates through the signal chain.

title: Persistent Data via Hidden Panel
description: Hidden ScriptPanel with saveInPreset and a control callback to persist arbitrary key-value data across preset loads. PersistentData namespace provides get/set accessors that store data in the panel's value, leveraging HISE's built-in preset serialization.

title: Local Iterator Variable in Inline Functions
description: Declaring local i before a for loop inside inline functions to prevent shared global iterator conflicts. Without the local declaration, nested inline function calls share the same loop counter causing infinite loops.

title: Panel Timer Countdown with Label
description: Panel setTimerCallback for a counting animation that updates a Label and hides the panel at completion. Uses panel value as counter, startTimer/stopTimer for timed execution, and showControl for visibility toggling.

title: Set Keyboard Key Colour
description: Engine.setKeyColour with an ARGB hex value to highlight a specific MIDI note on the on-screen keyboard. Sets note 60 (middle C) to a semi-transparent cyan colour.

title: Interactive ARGB Colour Picker
description: Four Content.addKnob sliders for ARGB channels with a convertToHex utility and live panel preview. Updates a colour string and repaints a preview panel on each knob change, displaying the hex colour code in a label.

title: Basic Graphics Drawing Primitives
description: Panel setPaintRoutine with drawEllipse, drawTriangle, and drawLine to render basic shapes. Shows the area array format [x, y, width, height] and border-size parameter for each Graphics drawing method.

title: Knob Configuration with setPropertiesFromJSON
description: Content.setPropertiesFromJSON to configure a knob's min, max, mode, stepSize, middlePosition, and suffix in a single call. Shows the JSON property object format for batch-setting component properties including Decibel mode.

title: Velocity-Sensitive Drum Pad Mouse Callback
description: Panel mouse callback that triggers MIDI notes via Synth.addNoteOn and Synth.addNoteOff for chord playback. Mouse Y position maps to velocity, providing velocity-sensitive drum pad behavior with proper note-off on mouse release.

title: Server GET Request with Authentication
description: Server.callWithGET used for HTTP authentication with custom Content-Type header via Server.setHttpHeader. Demonstrates passing credentials as GET parameter and POST body to a REST API endpoint.

title: Regex Number Detection in Strings
description: Engine.matchesRegex with a digit-only pattern (^\\d+$) to filter and parse numeric strings from a mixed array. Uses parseInt to convert matched strings to integers.

title: Flex AHDSR Envelope Full LAF Customization
description: Complete Look and Feel customization for the FlexAHDSR envelope component using registerFunction for background, path, curve points, segments, and position indicator. Demonstrates layered glow rendering with beginLayer, gradient fills, and pulsing animation via Engine.getUptime.

title: Neural Amp Modeler File Loading
description: Engine.createNeuralNetwork and loadNAMModel used to load a NAM JSON model file from the AudioFiles folder. Demonstrates the FileSystem API chain for loading neural network models in HISE.

title: Wavetable Loading via Button Text
description: Engine.loadAudioFilesIntoPool with Synth.getAudioSampleProcessor to load wavetable files by button name. Uses Content.getAllComponents to batch-assign a single setControlCallback to all matching buttons.

title: Wavetable HWT Export
description: Synth.getWavetableController and saveAsHwt used to export a precomputed HWT wavetable file. FileSystem.getFolder(FileSystem.AudioFiles) provides the output directory for the exported file.

title: ComboBox Transparent Popup Menu LAF
description: Custom Look and Feel for ComboBox popup menus using drawPopupMenuBackground with transparent fill and drawPopupMenuItem with rounded rectangle highlights. Demonstrates per-item styling with highlight state and custom text alignment.

title: SVG Logo Drawing on Panel
description: Content.createSVG with base64-encoded path data drawn on a dynamically created panel via setPaintRoutine and g.drawSVG. Shows the full workflow of creating an SVG, adding a panel with Content.addPanel, and rendering it.

title: Audio Pool File Browser with ComboBox
description: Engine.loadAudioFilesIntoPool combined with Synth.getAudioSampleProcessor to populate a ComboBox with pooled audio file names. Strips the PROJECT_FOLDER prefix and file extension for display, then loads the selected file via setFile on selection.

title: Keyboard Key Colour Range Setup
description: Engine.setKeyColour used in loops to visually distinguish active from inactive key ranges on the virtual keyboard. Darkens keys outside the playable range and highlights the active zone with a semi-transparent overlay.

title: Dynamic ScriptNode Effect Chain Ordering
description: Engine.createDspNetwork with dsp.get and setParent to dynamically reorder effects within named container slots at runtime. Demonstrates creating a scriptable signal chain where effects can be moved between slots or removed using index -1.

title: Floating Tile Child Tooltips with CSS Selectors
description: setChildTooltips used to assign descriptive tooltips to individual sub-components of a floating tile via CSS-style selectors (.class, #id). Enables targeted tooltip assignment for complex composite UI elements like the modulation matrix.

title: SVG Icon in Peak Meter LAF
description: Content.createSVG with drawMatrixPeakMeter LAF callback to render an SVG icon scaled by peak level. Uses g.drawSVG with obj.peaks[0] as the opacity parameter for level-reactive icon display.

title: Random User Preset Loader
description: Engine.getUserPresetList with Math.randInt to load a random user preset on button press via Engine.loadUserPreset. Demonstrates a complete random preset selection pattern with control callback.

title: Windows Machine GUID via Background Task
description: Engine.createBackgroundTask with runProcess to execute a Windows registry query for the MachineGuid. Demonstrates running an external process asynchronously with a completion callback that parses the output string.

title: Knob with Modulation Arc Display
description: connectToModulatedParameter used to enable modulation arc rendering on a ScriptSlider without changing its control behavior. Requires both the connectToModulatedParameter call and matching processorId/parameterId properties.

title: Viewport Scroll Position Timer Workaround
description: Engine.createTimerObject used as a one-shot timer to set a Viewport scroll position after initialization. Demonstrates the pattern of deferring a property change via a short timer with stopTimer in the callback.

title: Modwheel and Pitchwheel Visual Display
description: Panel paint routines driven by onController MIDI callback to display modwheel (CC1) and pitchwheel (CC128) positions as filled bar graphs. Uses Synth.deferCallbacks to safely update graphics from the controller callback, with repaint triggered by setValue/repaint pattern.

title: MIDI Player Note Rectangle Display
description: Synth.getMidiPlayer with getNoteRectangleList and connectToPanel for a custom MIDI note visualization. Scales note positions to fill the panel height based on pitch range, draws rounded rectangles with outlines, and shows a playback position line updated via setRepaintOnPositionChange.

title: Global Routing Data Cable Send
description: Engine.getGlobalRoutingManager with getCable and sendData to transmit JSON data objects between ScriptFX modules and the UI via global routing cables. Demonstrates the sender side of a cross-module data communication pattern.

title: Effect Bypass with Button Callback
description: Synth.getEffect with setBypassed toggled from a button control callback via setControlCallback. Shows the complete pattern for scripted effect bypass control including the generic script reference.

title: Custom Keyboard Image-Based LAF
description: drawWhiteNote and drawBlackNote LAF functions using loadImage and drawImage to render a custom keyboard with separate up/down state images. Uses a namespace wrapper and FloatingTile local look and feel for the keyboard component.

title: Background Task Kill Voices
description: Engine.createBackgroundTask with killVoicesAndCall to safely execute heavyweight operations on the sample loading thread after killing all active voices. Used for operations like sample map loading that require voice silence.

title: Note Range Key Filter
description: Message.getNoteNumber with Message.ignoreEvent in onNoteOn to restrict playback to a defined key range. Notes outside the LOW_KEY to HIGH_KEY range are silently ignored.

title: Panel as DAW Plugin Parameter
description: ScriptPanel configured as a plugin parameter with isPluginParameter and pluginParameterName properties, using Engine.createUserPresetHandler with sendParameterGesture for proper DAW automation gesture reporting. Includes mouse drag interaction with setValue/changed pattern and preprocessor guard for HISE_SEND_PANEL_CHANGED_TO_PLUGIN_PARAMETER.

title: Broadcaster Tooltip with Delayed Show
description: Engine.createBroadcaster with attachToComponentMouseEvents and addDelayedListener to implement a hovering tooltip that appears after 500ms of mouse inactivity. Tracks global mouse position via getGlobalPositionX/Y and repositions a hidden panel on delayed callback.

title: Loris Spectral Pitch Lock Function
description: Inline function for Loris spectral processing that locks partial frequencies to the nearest harmonic ratio of the root frequency. Interpolates between locked and original frequencies using a pitchLockAmount factor, with separate noiseGain control for bandwidth.

title: Timestretch Tempo Sync via Transport Handler
description: Engine.createTransportHandler with setOnTempoChange callback to dynamically adjust Synth.getSampler timestretch ratio based on host tempo. Uses getTimestretchOptions and setTimestretchOptions to configure SkipLatency before enabling tempo-synced playback.

title: Quadrilateral Path Drawing
description: Content.createPath with addQuadrilateral to draw a four-sided polygon (trapezoid) from corner point arrays. Demonstrates the simplified path construction compared to manual startNewSubPath/lineTo sequences.

title: Bipolar Pan Slider LAF
description: drawLinearSlider LAF with bipolar fill rendering from center point for a pan-style slider. Calculates fill direction based on whether value is left or right of center, with a draggable handle showing the numeric display value.

title: Audio Waveform Render Options LAF
description: getThumbnailRenderOptions LAF callback to customize audio waveform rendering quality by adjusting manualDownSampleFactor. Allows overriding the default downsampling for smoother waveform display in ScriptAudioWaveform components.

title: Broadcaster-Based Tab Switcher Panel
description: Namespace utility using Engine.createBroadcaster with attachToComponentValue and addComponentPropertyListener to create a tab-switching system. Automatically discovers child panels via getChildComponents and toggles visibility based on a switcher panel's value.

title: WebView MIDI Controller Forwarding
description: WebView callFunction used in onController to forward MIDI CC data to a WebView's JavaScript context. Passes controller number and value as a JSON object for web-based MIDI visualization or control mapping.

title: Loris Cross-Synthesis Pitch Shift
description: Engine.getLorisManager with analyse, createEnvelopePaths, and process to perform cross-synthesis between two audio files. Extracts frequency envelopes from one file and applies them as pitch shift to another, then synthesises and exports the result.

title: File Browser for IR Sample Loading
description: FileSystem.browse with a wildcard filter and callback to let users select an IR sample file at runtime. Demonstrates the browse-to-load pattern for impulse response files with an inline function button callback.

title: Viewport Table Mode with Columns and Callbacks
description: Viewport setTableMode, setTableColumns, and setTableRowData to create a data table with Text, Button, and Slider column types. Includes setTableCallback for handling row click interactions on the table data.

title: Display Buffer Waveform Visualization
description: Synth.getDisplayBufferSource with getDisplayBuffer and setRingBufferProperties to visualize a hardcoded effect's audio output. Uses createPath to generate a waveform path in the panel's paint routine, with a timer-driven repaint for real-time updates.

title: Non-Repeating Round Robin Selection
description: Random non-repeating value selection using two arrays to track used and available values. Shuffles through all values before repeating, useful for round-robin sample selection or randomized preset cycling.

title: Preset Name Number Prefix Stripper
description: String.replace combined with substring and indexOf to strip numbered prefixes (e.g. "2-Preset4" becomes "Preset4") from preset names. Useful for cleaning user-facing preset display names in ComboBoxes.

title: Icon Manager Namespace with Path Cache
description: Namespace pattern for managing icon paths using Content.createPath and loadFromData, storing them in a JSON lookup keyed by the button's text property. Separates icon data from LAF rendering and enables a single drawIconButton function for all icon buttons.

title: SNEX Waveshaper Node Template
description: Complete SNEX third-party node implementing a tanh waveshaper with a Drive parameter. Shows the full node template including process, processFrame, reset, prepare, setExternalData, and setParameter methods with Math.tanh saturation.

title: FFT Analyzer Buffer Size Override
description: Synth.getDisplayBufferSource with getDisplayBuffer and setRingBufferProperties to override the FFT buffer length of a Parametriq EQ display. Useful for customizing analyzer resolution since display properties are not persistent.

title: Multi-Column ComboBox from Sample Maps
description: Sampler.getSampleMapList with Content.getAllComponents to populate multiple ComboBoxes with categorized sample map names. Uses substring and indexOf to extract category prefixes and formats them with :: separator for multi-column display.

title: Rounded Image Mask with Animation
description: Panel paint routine using beginLayer, drawImage, applyMask, and endLayer to clip an image to a rounded rectangle shape. Includes a timer callback that animates the corner radius using Math.sin for a pulsing mask effect.

title: Broadcaster Audio File Drop Watcher
description: Engine.createBroadcaster with attachToComplexData for AudioFile.Content events to detect when a user drops an audio file on an audio player. Uses addComponentPropertyListener to update a label or trigger loading in response to the file change.

title: Broadcaster Listener Priority Ordering
description: Engine.createBroadcaster with addListener using priority metadata to control callback execution order. Higher priority values execute first, enabling deterministic ordering when multiple listeners respond to the same broadcast event.

title: Deferred Initialization with callAfterDelay
description: Content.callAfterDelay used to defer knob value initialization until after all variables are calculated. Workaround for timing issues where a callback runs before dependent values are ready during plugin startup.

title: Keyboard Key Colouring from Sample Map
description: Synth.getChildSynth with asSampler().isNoteNumberMapped and Engine.setKeyColour to highlight keyboard keys that have mapped samples. Uses Colours.withAlpha for semi-transparent blue overlay on active keys.

title: Scalable Multi-Knob Pitch Modulator Controller
description: Data-driven pattern using parallel arrays of knobs and modulator targets with a single shared setControlCallback. Uses indexOf to map the calling component to its target list, then iterates Synth.getModulator targets with setIntensity for one-to-many knob control.

title: ScriptFX Builder with Base64 State Restore
description: Synth.createBuilder with b.create and b.get to programmatically add a ScriptFX effect and restore its scriptnode state from a base64 string via restoreState. Shows the builder API workflow including flush for applying changes.

title: Waveform Playhead Ruler LAF
description: drawThumbnailRuler LAF callback to customize the playback position indicator in audio waveform components. Uses g.drawVerticalLine with obj.xPosition for a colored vertical line over the waveform display.

title: Module Tree Builder Basics
description: Synth.createBuilder with b.create to programmatically add a SineSynth generator and SimpleGain effect to the module tree. Shows the builder API workflow including ChainIndexes constants and the required flush call to rebuild the UI.

title: Drum Kit Builder with Multi-Bus Gains
description: Synth.createBuilder with a reusable inline function to create drum sampler modules with multiple gain stages (direct, mono, overhead, room). Demonstrates programmatic module tree construction for multi-mic drum instruments with consistent naming conventions.

title: Filmstrip Image Hot Reload
description: Content.getAllComponents with getAllProperties to iterate all components and reset their filmstripImage property by toggling to default skin and back. Forces image cache invalidation for development hot-reload workflows.

title: Panel Image with Alpha Tinting
description: Panel loadImage and drawImage combined with Colours.withAlpha to draw an image with variable opacity. The alpha channel of setColour controls the image transparency when drawn via g.drawImage.

title: Broadcaster Audio File Label with Path Prettification
description: Engine.createBroadcaster with attachToComplexData and addComponentPropertyListener to update a label when an audio file is loaded. Includes a conversion function that strips PROJECT_FOLDER prefix or converts absolute paths to filenames via FileSystem.fromAbsolutePath.

title: User Preset Post-Load Callback
description: Engine.createUserPresetHandler with setPostCallback to trigger a control update after a user preset is loaded. Uses changed() to re-fire a knob's callback, ensuring dependent values are recalculated after preset restore.

title: Pro Tools Default Parameter Fixer
description: Engine.createTimerObject one-shot timer that iterates all components via Content.getAllComponents, checks isPluginParameter, and resets each to its defaultValue with changed(). Workaround for DAWs that don't properly initialize plugin parameter values on load.

title: File Sort Comparator by Name
description: Inline function comparator for sorting File objects alphabetically by filename without extension. Uses toString with NoExtension flag for clean name comparison, suitable for passing to Array.sort.

title: Image Strip VU Meter LAF
description: drawMatrixPeakMeter LAF callback using drawImage with frame offset to render a filmstrip-based VU meter. Maps obj.peaks[0] level to a frame index for image-strip animation of the peak meter display.

title: Slider Snap with Interpolation
description: Value snapping logic that supports both strict snap-to-array-values mode and smooth interpolation between array entries. Uses Math.floor and Math.fmod to calculate the fractional position and linearly interpolate between adjacent snap points.

title: Mono Mode Sampler Script
description: MIDI processor using Message.getEventId and Message.ignoreEvent to enforce monophonic playback on a sampler. Tracks the current event ID and only allows a new note when no active note is playing, with note-off tracking via Message.getNoteNumber.

title: SNEX Soft-Hard Clipper Node
description: SNEX third-party node implementing a variable soft-to-hard clipper using atan-based waveshaping with a controllable amount parameter. The formula Math.sign * Math.pow(Math.atan(Math.pow(abs(input), 1/amount)), amount) provides smooth transition between soft and hard clipping curves.

title: Reorderable Panel Swap System
description: Effect rack reordering system using a container panel's value as persistent state for panel positions. Prev/Next buttons swap adjacent panel indices in the state array, with panelOrderHandler repositioning all panels by setting x coordinates based on the order array. Saves state in preset via the container's value object.

title: Audio Loop Player Tempo Sync Workaround
description: Engine.createTransportHandler with setOnTempoChange to force-refresh an Audio Loop Player's sync mode when the host tempo changes. Works around a sync mode initialization issue by re-setting the SyncMode attribute to its current value on each tempo change.

title: Local Variable Capture in Nested Callback
description: Pattern for accessing local variables inside nested function definitions (e.g. FileSystem.browse callback inside an inline function). Stores the component reference in a local variable before the nested closure to ensure it remains accessible in the callback scope.

title: Reg Nest Object for Nested Callback Access
description: Namespace-level reg object used to share data between an inline function and a nested callback (e.g. Server.callWithGET). Solves the HISEScript scoping limitation where local variables are not accessible inside nested function definitions.

title: Timer-Based Delayed Function Chain
description: Engine.createTimerObject with a state machine to execute a sequence of functions with delays between each step. Uses a reg state variable to track progress through the chain, with the timer restarting at different intervals for each stage.

title: Broadcaster Delayed Function Chain
description: Engine.createBroadcaster with callWithDelay to chain function calls with delays between each step. Cleaner alternative to timer-based state machines for sequential delayed execution, using random arguments to ensure the broadcaster fires on each call.

title: Drop Shadow from Circle Path
description: Content.createPath with quadratic bezier curves to approximate a circle, rendered as a soft drop shadow via g.drawDropShadowFromPath. Non-layer approach to creating glowing or faded circular effects without the subtle glitches of beginLayer/endLayer rasterization.

title: FFT Analyzer Display Buffer Configuration
description: Synth.getDisplayBufferSource with setRingBufferProperties to configure FFT analyzer display parameters including WindowType, DecibelRange, Decay, and UseLogarithmicFreqAxis. Properties can be copied from a scriptnode FFT node's Edit Properties panel and applied to any display buffer source like the Parametriq EQ.

title: Button-Triggered Panel Repositioning
description: showControl and setPosition used inside a button callback to show and vertically stack multiple panels. Pre-caches panel references in a const array for efficient iteration, avoiding repeated Content.getComponent calls inside the loop.

title: Dialog Button LAF Customization
description: laf.registerFunction("drawDialogButton") used to restyle the sample import dialog buttons. Applies custom colors and labels based on obj.text, handling "Install Samples", "Choose Sample Folder", and fallback cases.

title: Offline Audio Rendering with MIDI Events
description: Engine.renderAudio() and Engine.createMessageHolder() used to build a MIDI event list and render audio offline. Creates note-on/off pairs with timestamps, passes them to the render function, and provides a progress callback with channel data and completion status.

title: Programmatic UI Component Creation
description: Content.addPanel, Content.addKnob, and Content.addButton used to create UI components in script with Content.setPropertiesFromJSON for configuration. Shows parentComponent nesting, plugin parameter exposure, and property initialization.

title: Write JSON Data to Preset File
description: FileSystem child file used to write a JSON object to a preset file with existence validation. Demonstrates File.writeObject for persisting preset data to the user preset directory.

title: Custom Automation Slots with UserPresetHandler
description: Engine.createUserPresetHandler() with setCustomAutomation and attachAutomationCallback to create reassignable automation slots. Defines a custom preset data model with setUseCustomUserPresetModel and routes automation values through global cables.

title: Ring Buffer Spectrum Display Properties
description: Engine.createAndRegisterRingBuffer() with setRingBufferProperties to configure FFT spectrum display. Sets buffer length, window type, decibel range, peak decay, logarithmic frequency axis, and gamma correction for external ring buffers.

title: Thread-Safe Ring Buffer Copy
description: Buffer.create and copyReadBuffer used to safely read display buffer data from the timer callback thread. Preallocates a buffer matching the read buffer length and copies via synchronization locks instead of getReadBuffer().

title: SNEX Waveshaper with Dry/Wet Mix
description: SNEX shaper node template with a parameterized dry/wet mix control. Implements an exponential waveshaper transfer function and blends the processed signal with the clean input using a Mix parameter routed via setParameter.

title: Transport Handler Clock Setup
description: Engine.createTransportHandler() configured with grid sync, PreferExternal mode, and internal clock fallback. Enables LFO synchronization to DAW transport with automatic fallback to internal clock when playback is stopped.

title: SliderPack Reference Caching for LAF
description: Caches Content.getComponent references in an object keyed by component name for efficient access inside LAF paint routines. Avoids calling getComponent() during paint calls by pre-resolving SliderPack references at init time.

title: Dynamic IR Loading with Slot FX
description: SlotFX getCurrentEffect and Synth.getAudioSampleProcessor used to dynamically load impulse response files into a convolution reverb inside a SlotFX chain. Retrieves the active effect ID at runtime and sets the audio file.

title: Aspect Ratio Preserving Rectangle Fit
description: Utility function that returns a copy of a target rectangle adjusted to match the aspect ratio of a source rectangle. Useful for fitting a Path into a given area via Path.getBounds() without skewing proportions.

title: Expansion MIDI File Listing
description: ExpansionHandler getRootFolder and FileSystem.findFiles used to list MIDI files from an expansion's MidiFiles directory. Creates the directory if missing with createDirectory and populates a viewport with the filenames.

title: Broadcaster Shift-Key Component Watcher
description: Engine.createBroadcaster with attachToComponentMouseEvents and addComponentPropertyListener to dynamically change knob colors when shift-dragging. Watches mouse events on multiple components and updates itemColour properties based on modifier key state.

title: Local LAF Filter Drag Handle
description: Content.createLocalLookAndFeel with registerFunction("drawFilterDragHandle") to customize the appearance of EQ filter drag handles. Draws a filled ellipse with the filter index number centered on each handle position.

title: Multi-Sampler Section Power Toggle
description: Component array with setValue and changed() used to toggle multiple sampler power buttons from a single section control. Iterates button references to cascade enable/disable state and trigger their callbacks.

title: Transport Handler DAW Sync Setup
description: Engine.createTransportHandler() with setEnableGrid, setSyncMode(PreferExternal), and startInternalClock to sync LFOs to DAW transport. Falls back to internal clock when DAW playback is stopped.

title: Broadcaster EQ Mouse Event Watcher
description: Engine.createBroadcaster with attachToComponentMouseEvents to monitor parametric EQ floating tile interactions. Fires a listener callback on drag and click events to synchronize knob values with EQ band changes.

title: Broadcaster MIDI Player Sequence Callback
description: Engine.createBroadcaster with setEnableQueue and Synth.getMidiPlayer setSequenceCallback to monitor MIDI content changes. Uses the broadcaster as a direct callback object and dumps the event list when the sequence updates.

title: OSC Messaging Between HISE Instances
description: Engine.getGlobalRoutingManager with connectToOSC, sendOSCMessage, and addOSCCallback for inter-instance communication. Configures source/target ports and a domain prefix, then sends and receives string messages over OSC.

title: Animated Panel Open/Close Slide
description: Panel timer callback used to animate a sliding open/close effect triggered by a button. Increments or decrements panel width each tick and repositions to slide from right to left with boundary clamping.

title: RSA Encryption and Decryption
description: FileSystem.encryptWithRSA and decryptWithRSA used to encrypt and decrypt string data with RSA key pairs generated from Tools menu. Demonstrates the key format and round-trip encryption workflow.

title: Batched RSA Encryption Loop
description: FileSystem.encryptWithRSA called in batches of 100 to avoid HISE execution timeout. Splits a large array into chunks and logs progress, working around the script execution time limit for bulk encryption operations.

title: Global Routing Cable Callback
description: Engine.getGlobalRoutingManager with getCable and registerCallback to listen for value changes on a named global cable. Attaches an asynchronous UI-thread callback that fires whenever the cable value updates.

title: Rectangle Utility Namespace
description: Namespace of inline functions mimicking juce::Rectangle methods for array-based rectangle manipulation. Includes reduced, contains, withSizeKeepingCentre, removeFromLeft/Right/Top/Bottom, translated, scale, and copy for LAF paint routine layout calculations.

title: Triangle XY Pad with Drag Constraint
description: Panel mouse callback implementing a triangular XY pad controller with distance-based value calculation. Uses atan2 angle computation and radius clamping to constrain a draggable point within the intersection of three circles, outputting three distance-based values.

title: Multi-Slot Audio File Loading
description: Synth.getAudioSampleProcessor with getAudioFile to access multiple audio file slots from a single ScriptNode effect. Loads audio files into specific slot indices for multi-IR or multi-sample configurations.

title: Custom Volume and Pitch Fade Curves
description: Engine.createFadeHandler with setCustomVolumeFadeCallbacks and setCustomPitchFadeCallbacks to define per-event fade curves. Supports predefined types (Logarithmic, Linear) and registration to specific sound generators or as a global fade handler.

title: Sampler Sample Start/End/Loop Knob Controls
description: Synth.getSampler with createSelection and Sampler property constants (SampleStart, SampleEnd, LoopStart, LoopEnd, LoopXFade) to control sample playback ranges from knobs. Includes sample map loading via combo box with Sampler.getSampleMapList.

title: Keyboard Key Colour from Sample Map
description: Engine.setKeyColour with Sampler.isNoteNumberMapped to visually indicate which keys have mapped samples on the floating tile keyboard. Iterates all 128 MIDI notes and dims unmapped keys.

title: JSON File Existence Check
description: Engine.loadFromJSON with truthiness check to verify whether a JSON file exists in the project folder. Returns undefined if the file is missing, enabling simple conditional logic for optional configuration loading.

title: Encrypted Preference File Load/Save
description: File.writeEncryptedObject and loadEncryptedObject used to persist and retrieve encrypted JSON preference data. Creates the file on first run with a PIN key and loads it on subsequent launches with isDefined validation.

title: ComboBox LAF with Triangle Indicator
description: laf.registerFunction("drawComboBox") to custom-render a combo box with rounded rectangle border, left-aligned text, and a downward-pointing triangle indicator. Uses Colours.withAlpha for enabled/disabled state styling.

title: Convolution Reverb FFT Type Selection
description: Synth.getEffect with setAttribute to set the FFT algorithm type on a Convolution Reverb. Documents the FFT type constants: 0 (best available), 1 (IPP), 2 (Apple Accelerate), 3 (Ooura fallback).

title: Linked Delay Knobs with Toggle
description: Knob callback with Button.getValue check to conditionally link two knobs. Sets a delay module attribute and mirrors the value to a second knob via setValue and changed() when the link button is active.

title: Cross-Platform File Launch with startAsProcess
description: Engine.getOS with FileSystem.fromAbsolutePath and File.startAsProcess to open a PDF or folder on macOS and Windows. Checks for file existence before launching and handles per-platform absolute paths.

title: List Module Attribute IDs
description: Synth.getMidiProcessor with getNumAttributes and getAttributeId to enumerate all parameter names of an Arpeggiator or any HISE module. Useful for discovering unlisted attribute constants.

title: Panel Image with Opacity Knob
description: Panel.loadImage and setPaintRoutine with g.setOpacity and g.drawImage to display a project folder image with knob-controlled transparency. Repaints the panel from the knob's control callback.

title: Randomize All UI Controls
description: Content.getAllComponents with Math.randInt to randomize every UI control value within its min/max range. Skips the trigger button itself and calls changed() on each component to fire callbacks.

title: Expansion Handler with Sample Map Browser
description: Engine.createExpansionHandler with setAllowedExpansionTypes, setCurrentExpansion, and setExpansionCallback to build an expansion-aware sample map browser. Lists available expansions in a combo box and updates the sample map list when switching expansions, stripping expansion path prefixes for display.

title: Custom PNG Keyboard with Filmstrip Images
description: Global LAF drawWhiteNote and drawBlackNote with loadImage to render a custom keyboard using per-key filmstrip PNGs. Handles pressed/released states, key colour overlays, hover highlighting, and octave number labels on C keys.

title: Sampler Loop Enable Toggle
description: Sampler.createSelection with Sampler.LoopEnabled to toggle loop mode on all samples in a sampler via a button callback. Iterates the full sample selection and sets the loop state.

title: Audio Pool Files Split by Folder
description: Engine.loadAudioFilesIntoPool with substring parsing to split the audio file list into separate folder name and file name arrays. Extracts the subfolder structure from PROJECT_FOLDER paths and deduplicates folder names.

title: Audio Pool Files Sorted by Folder Object
description: Engine.loadAudioFilesIntoPool with isDefined and dynamic object properties to organize audio files into a single object keyed by folder name. Each key holds an array of filenames, enabling access via sorted.folderName[index].

title: Rotary Slider LAF with Arc and Line Indicator
description: laf.registerFunction("drawRotarySlider") with Content.createPath, g.drawPath, and g.rotate to draw a custom rotary knob with arc track and rotating line indicator. Calculates arc position from value range and renders with configurable stroke and indentation.

title: MIDI Note Number to Name Conversion
description: Utility function converting a MIDI note number (0-127) to a human-readable note name with octave (e.g., "C3", "F#5"). Uses modulo 12 for note letter lookup and division for octave calculation.

title: Server Response Logger to File
description: Server callback function that writes the HTTP response object and status code to a text file on the Desktop using FileSystem.getFolder and File.writeObject. Useful for debugging Server.callWithGET responses in compiled plugins.

title: Server API User Thumbnail Downloader
description: Server.callWithGET with REST API endpoint, Server.downloadFile, and Server.setBaseURL to batch-download user profile images from a NodeBB forum. Parses user objects, distinguishes local vs external image URLs, and saves files with username-based filenames.

title: Show/Hide Components by Selector Index
description: Array indexOf comparison with showControl to show or hide a series of knobs based on a selector component's value. Uses a ternary on the index comparison to toggle visibility.

title: Scrolling Text Credits with Timer
description: Engine.createTimerObject with Panel.setPaintRoutine to animate vertically scrolling text. Draws an array of names at calculated y-offsets and decrements the offset each timer tick to create a scrolling credits effect.

title: Toggle Button LAF with Hover States
description: laf.registerFunction("drawToggleButton") with obj.value, obj.over, obj.bgColour, and obj.itemColour1/2 to render a custom toggle button. Applies different fill colors for on/off and hover states with rounded rectangle and centered text.

title: Sample Map Browser with Prev/Next Buttons
description: Sampler.getSampleMapList with combo box and prev/next button callbacks to browse and load sample maps. Wraps around at list boundaries and triggers loadSampleMap through the combo box changed() callback.

title: Preset Browser Dialog Button LAF
description: laf.registerFunction("drawDialogButton") to restyle preset browser buttons (Add, Rename, Delete, Save Preset, More) with custom uppercase text. Maps original button labels to display names via parallel arrays.

title: ComboBox Image Switcher
description: Component array with showControl to display one image at a time based on combo box selection. Hides all images in a loop then shows only the one matching the selected index.

title: Value Range Remapping Function
description: Utility inline function to linearly remap a value from one range (oldMin-oldMax) to another (newMin-newMax). Standard linear interpolation formula for converting knob values to different parameter ranges.

title: Sequential Server GET Request Chaining
description: Server.callWithGET with named callback functions to chain sequential HTTP requests. Uses the response from the first call to construct the endpoint for the second, avoiding nested anonymous callback spaghetti.

title: Note Duration Measurement with Uptime
description: Engine.getUptime in onNoteOn and onNoteOff callbacks to measure note hold duration in milliseconds. Stores the start time in a reg variable and calculates elapsed time on note release for monophonic timing.

title: Batch Sampler Property Scaling
description: Sampler.createSelection(".*") with get/set on Sampler.LoopStart, LoopEnd, and SampleEnd to batch-modify sample properties. Multiplies all sample indices by a factor for samplerate conversion and calls Sampler.refreshInterface() to update the UI.

title: Save Parametric EQ State in User Presets
description: Synth.getIdList and Engine.addModuleStateToUserPreset to automatically persist all Parametriq EQ module states with user presets. Iterates all EQ IDs and registers them for serialization.

title: AppData User Preset File Listing
description: FileSystem.getFolder(FileSystem.AppData) with getChildFile and FileSystem.findFiles to list user preset files from the app data directory. Iterates results and prints full paths using File.toString.

title: SVG Path from Numeric Data Array
description: Content.createPath with loadFromData to render an SVG icon from a numeric array in a Panel paint routine. Converts exported path data into a drawable path and fills it with g.fillPath at a specified size.

title: Value Popup Styling Configuration
description: Content.setValuePopupData to customize the tooltip popup appearance including font, border, margin, background color, and text color. Documents all available styling properties for the knob/slider value popup overlay.

title: Convolution Reverb IR Button Switcher
description: Synth.getAudioSampleProcessor with setFile to load different convolution impulse response files from buttons. Switches between IR samples stored in the project AudioFiles folder.

title: Disable DSP Network Parameter Forwarding
description: Engine.createDspNetwork with setForwardControlsToParameters(false) to prevent the DSP network from intercepting UI control callbacks. Allows script-level control callbacks to handle parameter routing instead.
code:
const var dsp = Engine.createDspNetwork("dsp");

dsp.setForwardControlsToParameters(false);

title: Timer-Driven Modulator Level Display
description: Synth.getEffect with getModulatorChain(0) and getCurrentLevel to read the current gain modulation value on a timer. Updates a knob position every 30ms to visualize the real-time modulator output.

title: Bulk Disable SaveInPreset for All Components
description: Content.getComponentList("") to iterate all UI components and set saveInPreset to false. Uses empty regex string to match all components for bulk property changes.

title: Collect All Script Processors by ID List
description: Synth.getIdList("Script Processor") with Synth.getMidiProcessor to dynamically build an array of all script processor references. Useful when the number of processors is unknown at design time.

title: Rotating Image with Timer Animation
description: Panel.loadImage with g.rotate in setPaintRoutine and a timer callback to animate continuous image rotation. Button starts/stops the timer and a knob controls rotation speed via Math.toRadians.

title: Filmstrip Animation with Timer
description: Panel.loadImage with g.drawImage y-offset to animate a filmstrip sprite sheet using a timer callback. Cycles through frames by incrementing an index modulo total frames and repainting each tick.

title: MIDI Player Random Octave Transpose
description: MidiPlayer.getEventList with setTransposeAmount and flushMessageList to randomly transpose MIDI notes by octave on button press. Iterates the event list, checks isNoteOn, and applies a random 50% chance of -12 semitone shift.

title: MIDI Player Post-Load Random Transpose
description: MidiPlayer.setPostLoadingCallback with getEventList, setTransposeAmount, and flushEventList to automatically randomize note pitches whenever a new MIDI sequence is loaded. Applies random transposition within a ±5 semitone range.

title: Fine and Coarse Tune Knobs
description: Content.addKnob with Message.setFineDetune and Message.setCoarseDetune in onNoteOn/onNoteOff for per-note pitch adjustment. Creates fine (±100 cents) and coarse (±12 semitone) tuning controls.

title: Multi-Output Routing Matrix Switch
description: Synth.getChildSynth with getRoutingMatrix and addConnection to switch audio output channels via a combo box. Routes stereo pairs to different output buses and falls back to channels 1-2 on error.

title: MIDI Player Trigger on Key Press
description: MidiPlayer.play with Message.getTimestamp in onNoteOn to start MIDI playback when a specific key is pressed. Ignores the trigger note to prevent it from sounding.

title: Button-Triggered MIDI Note with MidiList
description: Engine.createMidiList with Synth.playNote and Synth.noteOffByEventId to play a MIDI note from a UI button. Tracks active event IDs in a MidiList and turns off the previous note before playing a new one.

title: AHDSR-Timed Note Off Delay
description: Synth.addNoteOn with Synth.noteOffDelayedByEventId using AHDSR envelope getAttribute to calculate note duration. Sums attack, hold, and decay times and converts to samples via Engine.getSamplesForMilliSeconds.

title: CC-Controlled Note Gate Filter
description: MIDI processor using Message.getControllerNumber and getControllerValue in onController to store CC64 (sustain pedal) state, then Message.ignoreEvent in onNoteOn to filter notes when the CC value exceeds a threshold.

title: Clickable Link Panel with Paint Routine
description: Panel with setPaintRoutine and setMouseCallback to create a clickable text link that opens a website on double-click via Engine.openWebsite. Configures allowCallbacks and draws centered text with custom color.

title: Custom Value Popup with Broadcaster
description: Engine.createBroadcaster with attachToComponentMouseEvents to show a positioned label as a custom value popup on knob drag. Tracks click, drag, and mouseUp events to position, update text, and hide the popup label dynamically.

title: HSL Image Tinting on Panel
description: Graphics.applyHSL inside a beginLayer/endLayer block to apply hue, saturation, and lightness adjustments to a drawn image. Uses Engine.loadImageIntoPool and panel.loadImage with three knob control callbacks to adjust each HSL parameter.

title: Radio Button Toggle with Ctrl Override
description: Content.getAllComponents with a regex pattern to create radio-button behavior across a set of buttons. Uses Content.isCtrlDown() to allow multi-selection when the Ctrl key is held.

title: Arc Drawing on Panel
description: Content.createPath with addArc and drawPath to draw partial arcs on a panel. Uses getBounds on the path for proper scaling and a pathData object to configure stroke thickness and type.

title: Rotating 3D Cube Renderer
description: Content.createPath with perspective projection math to render and animate a wireframe 3D cube on a panel. Uses setTimerCallback for continuous rotation and inline helper functions for rotation and normalized projection.

title: Macro Control Knob Array
description: Synth.setMacroControl with Content.getAllComponents to map an array of knobs to HISE macro controls. Uses indexOf to determine the macro index from the component reference.

title: ModWheel LAF with Gradient Lighting
description: LAF drawRotarySlider function that renders a realistic mod wheel with horizontal scrolling lines, a handle bar, and layered gradient lighting and shading effects. Uses setGradientFill for top/bottom shading and drawHorizontalLine for the wheel texture.

title: MIDI File Drag to DAW
description: Panel setMouseCallback with startExternalFileDrag and MidiPlayer.saveAsMidiFile to enable dragging a MIDI sequence from HISE into the DAW. Uses FileSystem.getFolder to create a temporary export file in AppData.

title: SliderPack Radio Button Behavior
description: Two SliderPacks linked to behave like radio buttons — clicking a slider in one pack resets the corresponding slider in the other. Uses setSliderAtIndex and changed() to synchronize mutual exclusion.

title: Shared SliderPack Data for Two LFOs
description: Engine.createAndRegisterSliderPackData with referToData and linkTo to share a single SliderPack UI across two LFO modulators. Both LFOs read from the same registered data source.

title: Background Audio Rendering to File
description: AudioSampleProcessor getAudioFile with setContentCallback to capture rendered audio from a file player into a buffer and write it to disk. Uses FileSystem.fromReferenceString and writeAudioFile to save the processed output as a WAV file alongside the source.

title: SliderPack LAF with Step Grid
description: LAF drawLinearSlider function for a SliderPack with integer step size. Draws a filled rectangle at the current value position and a background grid aligned to the step divisions.

title: Wavetable Position Mouse Drag
description: Panel setMouseCallback to control a wavetable synthesizer's table position by dragging vertically. Maps the mouse Y coordinate to a 0-1 range and applies it via setAttribute on the wavetable synth.

title: Viewport Item Name Lookup
description: Viewport control callback that splits the items property by newline to convert it to an array, then uses the viewport's selected index to retrieve the corresponding item name.

title: Rotary Slider LAF with Arc and Value Text
description: Content.createLocalLookAndFeel with drawRotarySlider to render a knob with background/value arcs using Content.createPath and addArc. Supports bidirectional mode detection, hover/click state text switching, and a rotating value indicator line. Uses Colours.withMultipliedAlpha and Colours.withMultipliedBrightness for enabled/hover state feedback.

title: Vertical Level Slider with Gradient Fill
description: Content.createLocalLookAndFeel with drawLinearSlider to render a vertical level meter. Uses g.setGradientFill with component itemColour properties and adjusts the fill rect based on obj.valueNormalized for the active level display.

title: Raycasting Game with Timer and Keyboard
description: Engine.createTimerObject with setKeyPressCallback and setPaintRoutine to build a raycasting renderer inside a HISE panel. Demonstrates DDA ray-wall intersection, player movement with delta smoothing, and real-time frame rendering using g.fillRect for vertical wall strips. Comprehensive example of timer-driven game loops and keyboard input handling in HISEScript.

title: ComboBox Factory with Rounded LAF
description: Namespace-based factory pattern using Content.addComboBox and Content.setPropertiesFromJSON to create styled combo boxes dynamically. Each instance gets its own Content.createLocalLookAndFeel with a drawComboBox callback that draws rounded rectangles and extracts label text from the component name.

title: Mono Oscilloscope with Motion Trails
description: Synth.getDisplayBufferSource with getDisplayBuffer and setRingBufferProperties to capture audio into a ring buffer for oscilloscope visualization. Uses Engine.createTimerObject for frame updates, Buffer.create for decimated frame storage, and Content.createPath to draw waveform paths with motion trails and glow effects on a panel paint routine.

title: Stereo Oscilloscope with Dual Buffers
description: Stereo variant of an oscilloscope using two getDisplayBuffer channels (0 and 1) from the same DisplayBufferSource. Maintains separate Buffer.create instances, frame buffers, and cached path objects for left and right channels with distinct colours. Demonstrates multi-channel ring buffer visualization with synchronized timer updates.

title: dB Peak Meter with Timer Callbacks
description: Engine.createTimerObject with setTimerCallback to poll Synth.getEffect getCurrentLevel and display the result as decibels via Engine.getDecibelsForGainFactor. Updates label text at 60ms intervals for real-time input and output gain monitoring.

title: AHDSR Table Curve Control with Invert
description: Synth.getTableProcessor with setTablePoint and reset to programmatically control AHDSR envelope curves from a knob. Supports normal and inverted table configurations across two linked table indices, with preset shape strings loaded via restoreFromBase64. Uses Table.connectToOtherTable for UI synchronization.

title: Panel saveInPreset Storage Pattern
description: Dynamically created panels with Content.addPanel used as invisible preset storage containers. Uses a delayed setTimerCallback to set saveInPreset after the panel value is initialized, working around the timing requirement that data must be stored before enabling preset saving. Demonstrates the difference between storing undefined vs defined values.

title: CSS Toggle Switch Button
description: Content.createLocalLookAndFeel with setInlineStyleSheet to create an iOS-style toggle switch button using CSS. Uses ::before pseudo-element for the sliding circle, :checked state for the on position, and CSS transitions for smooth animation.

title: Knob Arc LAF with Pointer Indicator
description: Content.createLocalLookAndFeel with drawRotarySlider to draw a rotary knob using three overlapping arcs — background, value, and pointer. Uses Content.createPath with addArc and Rectangle helper for precise arc geometry and configurable thickness.

title: Multiline Text on Panel
description: g.drawMultiLineText inside a setPaintRoutine to render word-wrapped text on a panel. Takes a text string, bounding area, alignment, and line spacing parameter for automatic line breaking based on the panel width.

title: Delay Time with Tempo Sync Toggle
description: Synth.getEffect with setAttribute to control delay time and tempo sync mode from knob and button callbacks. Toggles the knob mode property between Time and TempoSync to match the delay module state, using Knob.changed() to refresh the display.

title: Radio Button Group with getAllComponents
description: Content.getAllComponents with a regex pattern to create exclusive radio button behavior. Iterates the matched buttons array in the control callback to set mutual exclusion, with default state initialization in a setup loop.

title: Audio File Browser for AudioSampleProcessor
description: FileSystem.browse with FileSystem.getFolder(FileSystem.Downloads) to open a WAV file picker. Loads the selected file into a Synth.getAudioSampleProcessor via setFile inside the browse callback, with isDefined and isFile validation.

title: Circular XY Pad with Angle and Distance
description: Panel setMouseCallback with Math.atan and Math.sqrt to implement a circular XY pad that maps mouse position to angle and distance. Normalizes circular coordinates to square XY values for modulator control via setAttribute. Uses setPaintRoutine with g.rotate to position the cursor along the angle and draw an elliptical boundary.

title: XY Pad Shapes with Disc-Square Mapping
description: Five XY pad variants (square and circular) with mathematical disc-to-square and square-to-disc coordinate mappings based on Chamberlain Fong's analytical methods. Each pad shape uses a different projection, with linked knobs for X/Y output and optional cursor size and aspect ratio controls. Comprehensive panel mouse and paint callback implementation.

title: Table Popup with Point Index Lookup
description: Table.setTablePopupFunction with getTablePointsAsArray to display point index and normalized coordinates in the table popup. Iterates the points array to match x/y values and find the corresponding index.

title: Preset Browser Data with Broadcaster
description: FloatingTile get("Data").parseAsJSON() to modify preset browser properties at runtime. Uses Engine.createBroadcaster with attachToComponentMouseEvents to detect hover state and toggle the ShowEditButtons property dynamically.

title: Chained Broadcasters with attachToOtherBroadcaster
description: Engine.createBroadcaster with attachToOtherBroadcaster to chain two broadcasters together. When the first broadcaster's state changes via a button callback, the second broadcaster's listener fires with the propagated value.

title: Bitcrusher Staircase Visualization
description: Panel setPaintRoutine with g.drawLine to render a staircase waveform representing the bit depth of a Synth.getEffect Bitcrusher. A knob control callback triggers repaintImmediately and updates the Bitcrusher.BitDepth attribute.

title: Analog Clock with Engine.getSystemTime
description: Engine.getSystemTime with setTimerCallback and setPaintRoutine to render an analog clock face with hour, minute, and second hands. Uses trigonometric functions for hand positioning, g.drawLine for rendering, and Synth.addNoteOn to tick on each second. Includes date display and hour/minute markers around the clock face.

title: Diagonal Menu with Mouse Hit Detection
description: Panel setPaintRoutine with g.drawLine to draw diagonal menu stripes. Uses setMouseCallback with coordinate math to detect which diagonal stripe the mouse is over based on the x-y offset relationship.

title: Component Position Tracker with Broadcaster
description: Engine.createBroadcaster with attachToComponentMouseEvents and Content.getComponentUnderMouse to track hovered components. Recursively walks the parentComponent chain to compute absolute screen position, displaying the tooltip and coordinates on a panel.

title: HSL Colour Palette Generator
description: Colours.toHsl and Colours.fromHsl with typed inline functions to generate a 10-shade colour palette from a base colour. Includes hue shifting, parabolic saturation curves, and automatic text colour contrast based on background luminance. Uses panel bgColour property as the palette seed.

title: Clickable URL Panel with Hover States
description: Panel setPaintRoutine and setMouseCallback to create a clickable URL label with hover and click colour states. Extracts the display text by stripping the https:// prefix when the URL contains www.

title: Filter Mode Selection with ComboBox
description: Engine.getFilterModeList() to retrieve available filter modes and map a subset to a ComboBox. Uses an index array to convert the 1-based combo box value to the correct filter mode constant for Synth.getEffect setAttribute.

title: Broadcaster Property Sync Across Knobs
description: Engine.createBroadcaster with attachToComponentProperties to monitor the x property of a knob and synchronize it to other knobs. Demonstrates the three-argument broadcaster pattern for component property observation.

title: Launch External Process from Button
description: FileSystem.fromAbsolutePath with startAsProcess to launch an external application (installer pkg) from a button click callback. Uses the system /usr/bin/open binary as the process launcher.

title: TransportHandler with Beat and Sync Modes
description: Engine.createTransportHandler with setOnBeatChange, setOnTransportChange, and setSyncMode to handle DAW transport synchronization. Switches between PreferExternal and SyncInternal modes based on playback state, with stopInternalClockOnExternalStop(false) to keep the internal clock running when the DAW stops. Includes startInternalClock/stopInternalClock button control.

title: Arpeggiator SliderPack Access
description: Synth.getSliderPackProcessor with getSliderPack and referToData to link SliderPack UI components to an Arpeggiator's internal data. Uses setSliderAtIndex to modify note values from a button callback.

title: Locked Drag Direction Detection
description: Panel setMouseCallback with event.isDragOnly and event.dragX to detect the initial drag direction and lock subsequent movement to that axis. Stores the locked direction in panel data and clears it on mouseUp.

title: Global Broadcaster with Radio Buttons
description: Global broadcaster stored in a global object with sendAsyncMessage to dispatch the selected button index. Uses Content.getAllComponents with radio button exclusion logic in the control callback.

title: LFO Waveform Type via ComboBox
description: Synth.getModulator with setAttribute to set LFO WaveFormType from a ComboBox selection. Uses an index mapping array to convert the 1-based combo box value to non-sequential waveform type constants.

title: Open User Presets Folder
description: FileSystem.getFolder(FileSystem.UserPresets) with isDirectory and show() to open the user presets directory in the system file browser from a button callback.

title: Dynamic Preset Panel Factory
description: Content.addPanel with Content.setPropertiesFromJSON to dynamically create preset selection panels in a grid layout. Each panel stores a preset name in its text property and uses setMouseCallback with hover state colour feedback and click-to-load behavior that iterates component-value pairs.

title: Panel Navigation with Prev/Next Arrows
description: Toggle button LAF with g.drawTriangle for left/right arrows that cycle through panels via a combo box. Uses showControl in the combo callback to display the selected panel, with wraparound logic in the prev/next callbacks.

title: Drop Shadow on Container Panel
description: g.drawDropShadow inside a container panel's setPaintRoutine to draw shadows behind sub-panels. Iterates child panel references to get their position and size for shadow placement.

title: Drop Shadow in Sub-Panel Paint Routine
description: g.drawDropShadow inside each sub-panel's own setPaintRoutine using getLocalBounds with an inset to create the shadow area. Fills a rounded rectangle over the shadow for the panel body.

title: Table Link Toggle via processorId
description: Table component set("processorId") to dynamically link and unlink a Table UI component from a Midi Controller table processor via a button toggle.

title: Table Data Switching with linkTo
description: Engine.createAndRegisterTableData with Synth.getTableProcessor getTable().linkTo() to switch a MIDI controller between two registered table data sources. Uses referToData to connect the Table UI to one of the data sources.

title: ComboBox Item Disabling with Markup
description: Dynamic combo box item list manipulation using ~~ string markup to indicate disabled items. Clones the items array, wraps the selected item with tildes, and reassigns the items property to all combo boxes via set("items").

title: ComboBox LAF with Disabled Items
description: Content.createLocalLookAndFeel with drawPopupMenuItem and drawComboBox to render disabled combo box items with reduced opacity. Uses ~~ string markup to flag disabled items, detected via obj.text.contains("~~") in the LAF callback, with dynamic item list updates from a shared control callback.

title: Panel-Based ComboBox with Mutual Exclusion
description: Panel popupMenuItems property with setPaintRoutine and setMouseCallback to create combo box behavior on panels. Implements mutual exclusion between two panel combo boxes using ~~ markup for disabled items in the popupMenuItems string. Uses selectedPopupIndex and event.result for popup menu handling.

title: Keyboard LAF for Black and White Notes
description: Content.createLocalLookAndFeel with drawBlackNote and drawWhiteNote to customize the keyboard FloatingTile appearance. Extends the black key width with a +4 offset for visual overlap.

title: Function Dispatch via Panel Data Keys
description: Panel setValue with string keys that reference entries in a separate functions object, working around the limitation that functions cannot be stored directly in panel data. Uses setMouseCallback with click area detection to dispatch the appropriate function.

title: Variable Type Performance Benchmark
description: Console.startBenchmark and Console.stopBenchmark to compare performance of reg, reg array, const var array, var, local, and local array variable types in a tight loop. Demonstrates the performance characteristics of each HISEScript variable storage type with Math.log computation.

title: Server.callWithGET with Dynamic Eval
description: Server.setBaseURL and Server.callWithGET to fetch code strings from a remote server. Uses eval() to execute the received function string on button click, with string escaping/de-escaping utility functions for handling quoted characters in the response.
